detaileddescription.para: Defines the prefix for MLVoiceResult codes.
Operation failed because a required voice intent feature is disabled in system settings.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: Return values for Voice API calls.

detaileddescription.para: Intent hotword detected, Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) session is going to start.
Voice UI is stopped, ASR session is going to stop.
ASR session is stopped due to abort.
ASR session is stopped without detecting an intent.
ASR session is stopped due to timeout.
ASR session is stopped due to error.
Intent mode is started and ready.
Intent mode is stopped and not available.
Invalid app intent, double check content of JSON submitted with MLVoiceIntentConfigureSettings(). Please refer to Voice Intent Development Toolkit from Magic Leap Hub to generate app intent content.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: Voice state in voice event.

detaileddescription.para: In case of success.
When the MLVoiceState in MLVoiceIntentEvent is either MLVoiceState_IntentSessionEndedTimeout or MLVoiceState_IntentSessionEndedError.
When the MLVoiceState in MLVoiceIntentEvent is MLVoiceState_IntentSessionEndedNoIntent.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: No intent reason code in voice event.
Return values for Voice API calls.
Voice state in voice event.
No intent reason code in voice event.
A structure containing voice app-intent slot in voice event.
A structure containing voice intent event.
A structure containing callbacks for voice intent events.

detaileddescription.para: The final parameter to all the callbacks is a void *, which will point to whatever payload data the user provides in MLVoiceIntentSetCallbacks. Individual callbacks which are not required by the client can be NULL.
This structure must be initialized by calling MLVoiceIntentCallbacksInit() before use.

briefdescription.para: A structure containing settings for voice app intent.

detaileddescription.para: This structure must be initialized by calling MLVoiceIntentSettingsInit() before use.

briefdescription.para: Initializes default values for MLVoiceIntentCallbacks.

parameterdescription.para: The object to initialize with default settings.

briefdescription.para: Initializes default values for MLVoiceIntentSettings.

parameterdescription.para: The object to initialize with default settings.

briefdescription.para: Creates a voice intent client.

parameterdescription.para: A handle to the created voice intent client. Only valid if the return value is MLResult_Ok.
Failed to create the voice intent client due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully created the voice intent client.
Failed to create client due to missing permission.

briefdescription.para: Destroys a voice intent client.

parameterdescription.para: MLHandle to the voice intent client to destroy.
Failed to destroy the voice intent client due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully destroyed the voice intent client.

briefdescription.para: Sets the settings for voice intent events.

detaileddescription.para: App needs to call MLVoiceIntentConfigureSettings at least once before it calls MLVoiceIntentStartProcessing. App can call MLVoiceIntentConfigureSettings anytime it needs to update the voice intents. But such call will trigger updating intent grammar inside speech engine, which may result in a short delay (could be a few seconds depending on the device's workload). So it is not recommended to call the function frequently.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to the voice intent client.
Pointer to MLVoiceIntentSettings structure.
Failed to set settings for voice intent events due to an invalid param.
Successfully set settings for voice intent events.
Failed to set the settings because required voice intent feature is disabled.
The operation failed with an unspecified error.

briefdescription.para: Sets the callbacks for voice intent events.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to the voice intent client.
Pointer to MLVoiceIntentCallbacks structure. Set this to NULL to unregister callbacks.
Pointer to user payload data (can be NULL).
Failed to set callbacks for voice intent events due to an invalid param.
Successfully set callbacks for voice intent events.
Failed to set the callbacks because required voice intent feature is disabled in system settings.
The operation failed with an unspecified error.

briefdescription.para: Starts voice intent processing.

detaileddescription.para: This API call affects the system voice service.

NOTE: If your application is processing voice intents make sure to call MLVoiceIntentStopProcessing when application loses focus and MLVoiceIntentStartProcessing when application gains focus to allow for uninterrupted processing of the voice intents.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to the voice intent client.
Failed to start processing due to an invalid parameter.
Successfully start intent processing.
Failed to start intent processing because required voice intent feature is disabled in system settings.
The operation failed with an unspecified error.

briefdescription.para: Stops voice intent processing.

detaileddescription.para: This API call affects the system voice service.

NOTE: If your application is processing voice intents make sure to call MLVoiceIntentStopProcessing when application loses focus and MLVoiceIntentStartProcessing when application gains focus to allow for uninterrupted processing of the voice intents.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to the voice intent client.
Failed to stop processing due to an invalid parameter.
Successfully stop intent processing.
Failed to stop intent processing because required voice intent feature is disabled in system settings.
The operation failed with an unspecified error.

briefdescription.para: Checks voice intent feature is enabled in the system.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to the voice intent client.
Returns status whether voice intent feature is enabled in system settings.
Failed to check due to an invalid parameter.
The API call completed successfuly.

briefdescription.para: Returns an ASCII string for MLVoiceResult and MLResult codes.

parameterdescription.para: The input MLResult enum from MLVoice functions.

simplesect.para: ASCII string containing readable version of result code.
